input_instruction: Create a minimal acoustic detection scenario based on the official acoustic/simple_demo. Include a sensing platform, a target, an acoustic sensor, and a short run duration.
Create a one-versus-one air combat scenario based on the official air_to_air/1v1 demo. Include blue and red fighters, movers, weapons, and engagement behavior.
Create a chaff countermeasure scenario based on the official chaff/chaff_example demo. Include an aircraft using chaff against a threat sensor or weapon chain.
Create a cyber script effect scenario based on the official cyber/Cyber_Script_Effect_Demo. Include networked entities and a script-driven cyber effect.
Create a kinematic mover demonstration based on the official kinematic_mover/kinematic_mover_demo. Include a moving platform with route or kinematic motion behavior.
